# UC-13.2.39 · Fluent Bit Storage Layer Chunk I/O Retry Exhaustion

## Description

Storage retries exhausted means on-disk chunks may never reach Splunk.

## Value

Protects log completeness SLAs for edge and Kubernetes collectors.

## Implementation

Tune `storage.max_chunks_up` and disk paths; correlate with output plugin errors.

## SPL

```spl
index=fluent sourcetype="fluentbit:storage" OR (sourcetype="fluentbit:log" "storage")
| search "retry" AND ("error" OR "failed" OR "give up")
| stats count by host, input_name, output_name
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (input × output), Line chart (retry rate).

## References

- [Fluent Bit monitoring — storage](https://docs.fluentbit.io/manual/administration/monitoring)
- [Fluentd monitoring](https://docs.fluentd.org/deployment/monitoring)
